title: AE2 QoL Client
description: Add qol features to the integration between ae2 and jei
body:
# AE2 QoL Client

* modid: aeqc
* environment: client

---

## Dependencies

* mafglib(https://modrinth.com/mod/mafglib)
* ae2
* jei
* ae2-jei-integration(1.21.1 only)

---

## Feature List

Press hotkey C+Q to configure all these.

* F key: search the jei ingredient in the ae2 terminals, C key: clear search
    * ME Terminal, ME Crafting Terminal, Pattern Encoding Terminal
    * Pattern Access Terminal
    * Ex Pattern Access Terminal(Extended AE)
    * Other mods, at least for:
        * Toms' Storage
        * Refined Storage
        * Ars Nouveau
* Middle Mouse Button to auto craft the jei ingredient
* HOME key: pull one jei item from the ae repository, END key: pull stack
* Add a left toolbar button to the auto craft confirm screen, which bookmarks all the missing entries to jei on click.
* Pattern placeholder for pseudo auto crafting
* Encode pattern with CTRL pressing to skip pattern merging, convenient for mechanical crafters in Create
* Auto Blank Pattern Restock
* GT Integration
    * Convert molten-alloy to corresponding ingot
    * Convert hot-ingot to corresponding ingot
    * Remove circuit
